name: ss-dairy-products-root
description: Unified runner for SS Dairy Products

scripts.test-server: node -e "const http = require('http'); http.get('http://localhost:5000/api/health', (res) => { console.log('Server status:', res.statusCode === 200 ? 'OK' : 'FAIL'); process.exit(0); }).on('error', (e) => { console.log('Server status: ERROR', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
